_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="run_in_terminal"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_in_terminal**</summary>

**Input:**

- command: `$devices = @('ThingStructureAdvancedFurnace','ThingStructureLiquidTankBig','ThingStructureGasSensor','ThingStructureVendingMachineSmall','ThingStructureStackerReverse','ThingStructureLargeHangerDoor','ThingStructureMediumHangerDoor','ThingStructureEmergencyButton','ThingStructureDaylightSensor','ThingStructureLogicBatchReader','ThingStructureSolarPanelDual','ThingStructureWaterBottleFillerPoweredBottom','ThingStructureGrowlightLarge','ThingModularDeviceDial','ThingStructureGasUmbilicalFemale','ThingDynamicLight','ThingStructureLogicRocketDownlink'); $json = Get-Content 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\Stationeers\Stationpedia\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $output = @(); foreach($d in $devices) { $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $d}; if($entry) { $logics = @{}; foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) { if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType(\w+)') { $logics[$matches[1]] = @{access=$l.LogicAccessTypes} } }; $slots = @(); if($entry.Slots) { foreach($s in $entry.Slots) { $slots += @{name=$s.SlotName; type=$s.SlotType} } }; $output += @{device=$d; title=($entry.Title -replace '<[^>]+>',''); logics=$logics; slots=$slots; logicCount=$logics.Count} } }; $output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\batch10_logic_data.json' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Extracted logic data for $($output.Count) devices" -ForegroundColor Green; $output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.title): $($_.logicCount) logic types" }`
- explanation: `Extract logic types and metadata for batch 10 devices from Stationpedia.json`
- isBackground: `false`

</details></tool-use>

**Input:**

- agentName: `planning-subagent`
- description: `Research device logic types`
- prompt:

```
Research the logic type implementations for the 17 devices in batch 10. I need to understand what Mode, Setting, Error, Lock, Activate, Ratio, and other device-specific logic types do for each device.

Devices to research:
1. ThingStructureAdvancedFurnace (AdvancedFurnace.cs)
2. ThingStructureLiquidTankBig (likely in Tank or LiquidTank files)
3. ThingStructureGasSensor (GasSensor.cs)
4. ThingStructureVendingMachineSmall (VendingMachine.cs)
5. ThingStructureStackerReverse (Stacker.cs)
6. ThingStructureLargeHangerDoor / ThingStructureMediumHangerDoor (Door files)
7. ThingStructureEmergencyButton (Button files)
8. ThingStructureDaylightSensor (DaylightSensor.cs)
9. ThingStructureLogicBatchReader (BatchReader.cs)
10. ThingStructureSolarPanelDual (SolarPanel.cs)
11. ThingStructureWaterBottleFillerPoweredBottom (WaterBottleFiller.cs)
12. ThingStructureGrowlightLarge (GrowLight.cs)
13. ThingModularDeviceDial (Dial.cs)
14. ThingStructureGasUmbilicalFemale (Umbilical.cs)
15. ThingDynamicLight (PortableLight.cs or DynamicLight.cs)
16. ThingStructureLogicRocketDownlink (RocketDownlink.cs)

For each device, search for:
- GetLogicValue method (what logic types return what values)
- SetLogicValue method (what logic types can be set)
- CanLogicRead and CanLogicWrite methods
- Mode, Setting, Error, Lock, Activate implementations
- ModeStrings property if Mode exists
- Any enums related to Mode

Return a structured report with:
- Device name
- Logic types and their descriptions based on actual code behavior
- Mode enum values if applicable
- What Setting controls
- What Error conditions exist
- Any special notes

Work autonomously. Read all necessary source files. This is for documentation purposes.
```


</details></tool-use>

  "batchNumber": 10,

    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureVendingMachineSmall",
      "title": "Vending Machine Small",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered."
        },
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Device on/off state. Can be set via logic."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "description": "Power draw in watts."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "description": "Device type hash identifier."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "description": "Custom name hash if device has been labeled."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for the device."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Lock state preventing manual interaction. Can be set via logic."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Error state indicating device malfunction or problem."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Write 1 to activate vending operation. Read returns activation state."
        },
        "Ratio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Fill ratio of storage slots."
        },
        "ImportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Number of items in the Import slot."
        },
        "ExportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Number of items in the Export slot."
        },
        "ClearMemory": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Write-only. Write 1 to clear the device's memory."
        },
        "RequestHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "description": "Hash of the item type being requested. Can be set via logic."
        },
        "TargetPrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "description": "Hash of the currently targeted item type."
        },
        "Quantity": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Quantity of the targeted item available."
        },
        "TargetSlotIndex": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Index of the storage slot containing the target item."
        }
      },
      "slots": [
        {
          "name": "Import",
          "type": "Standard"
        },
        {
          "name": "Export",
          "type": "Standard"
        },
        {
          "name": "Storage",
          "type": "Standard"
        },

          "name": "Storage",
          "type": "Standard"
        },

          "type": "Standard"

    {

        },
        "On": {

          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Device on/off state. Can be set via logic."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "description": "Power draw in watts."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "description": "Device type hash identifier."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "description": "Custom name hash if device has been labeled."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for the device."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Lock state preventing manual interaction. Can be set via logic."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Error state indicating device malfunction or problem."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Write 1 to activate stacking/unstacking operation. Read returns activation state."
        },
        "Mode": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Operating mode: 0 = Stack (combine items), 1 = Unstack (split items). Can be set via logic."
        },
        "Setting": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "1+",
          "description": "Target quantity per stack when stacking, or quantity to split when unstacking. Can be set via logic."
        },
        "Output": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Output value (implementation specific). Can be set via logic."
        },
        "ImportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Number of items in the Import slot."
        },
        "ExportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Number of items in the Export slot."
        },
        "ClearMemory": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Write-only. Write 1 to clear the device's memory."
        }
      },
      "slots": [
        {
          "name": "Import",
          "type": "Standard"
        },
        {
          "name": "Export",
          "type": "Standard"
        },
        {
          "name": "Processing",
          "type": "Standard"
        }
      ]
    },

      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureLargeHangerDoor",

      "logicDescriptions": {

          "range": "0-2",
          "description": "Operating mode: 0 = Closed, 1 = Open, 2 = Auto. Can be set via logic."

          "range": "0+",
          "description": "Door operation setting (possibly speed or timing parameter). Can be set via logic."

          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Returns 1 if door is not currently moving (idle state)."

    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureDaylightSensor",
      "title": "Daylight Sensor",
      "logicDescriptions": {

          "range": "0-1",

        },

          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "description": "Write 1 to trigger sensor reading. Read returns activation state."
        },

          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-360°",
          "description": "Current angle of the sun in degrees."
        },
        "SolarIrradiance": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W/m²",
          "description": "Solar irradiance (power per square meter) at sensor location."
        },
        "Horizontal": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "-180 to 180°",
          "description": "Horizontal angle to the sun in degrees."
        },
        "Vertical": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "-90 to 90°",
          "description": "Vertical angle to the sun in degrees."
        }
      },
      "slots": []
